untranslatable_reason: This signal describes an options calendar spread strategy (selling near-term call, buying longer-term call) with entry based on relative proximity to strike price and exit on near-term expiration. The backtest engine operates on price/technical indicators only and cannot model: (1) options positions and their Greeks, (2) strike price proximity metrics, (3) time decay differentials between two separate options, (4) option expiration dates, or (5) pricing model calculations. Translation would require options-specific indicators and multi-leg position management not supported by the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_213 is an advanced options strategy requiring dedicated options analytics. It cannot be approximated using equity price action indicators alone without losing the strategy's core mechanics (calendar spread time decay capture).
